summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ForgeRun platform - all 17 backend API tests passed and all frontend UI tests passed. The app is fully functional with all 5 layers working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API responses properly exclude MongoDB _id fields
Environment variables are used correctly for API URLs
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds demo data on startup: 3 artifacts, 8 ledger events, 1 deployment, 48 metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend tests cover: health, dashboard, artifacts (list/compile), ledger (list/proof/ask-why), healing (status/trigger), deployments (list/deploy), metrics. Frontend tests cover: navigation between all 5 views, form interactions, button clicks, data display.

mocked_apis.note: All LLM/AI features use MOCK data as specified
mocked_features: Self-healing LLM responses are mocked with realistic demo scenarios
Deploy flow is simulated with mock terminal output and mock URLs (*.forgerun.app)

backend: GET /api/dashboard - returns overview with artifacts, deployments, events, metrics
GET /api/artifacts - returns list of seeded artifacts
POST /api/artifacts/compile - creates new artifact with signature, dependencies
GET /api/healing/status - returns agent statuses and healing events
POST /api/deploy - deploys artifact and returns URL
frontend: Dashboard page loads with stat cards, charts, activity timeline, deployed apps
Navigation between all 5 views (Dashboard, Artifact Compiler, Verifiable Ledger, Self-Healing Loop, Deploy)
Artifact Compiler form works: fill name + vibe + compile button shows result
Verifiable Ledger shows events with expand/collapse and proof hashes
Self-Healing Loop shows 3 agent cards and trigger healing button works
Deploy view shows terminal output when deploying an artifact
